wine_retailers.name: Les Caves du Forum
wine_retailers.description: A Reims caviste set in 16th-century chalk caves carved 9 metres underground, with more than 4000 references of champagne, French wines and spirits.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grower and house champagne, French regional wines, library vintages in chalk-cellar storage

wine_retailers.name: La Cave Plus de Bulles
wine_retailers.description: The Reims shop of champagne specialist Plus de Bulles, with more than 400 references from major houses and grower artists. Tasting workshops and a small terrace.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grower and grande marque champagne, confidential cuvees, tasting workshops

wine_retailers.name: Millesimes & Saveurs
wine_retailers.description: An independent Reims caviste carrying champagnes, French wines, spirits and local produce, with build-your-own gift cases and champagne boxes.
wine_retailers.speciality: Champagne, French regional wines, spirits and gift cases

wine_retailers.name: 520 Champagnes et Vins d'Auteurs
wine_retailers.description: Pierre-Yves Cainjo's Epernay champagne cave, carrying some 650 references from 180 growers and houses. Saturday-morning producer tastings run free at the counter.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grower champagne across all sub-regions, vins d'auteurs, free Saturday tastings

wine_retailers.name: Tresors de Champagne, La Boutique
wine_retailers.description: The retail boutique of the Club Tresors de Champagne, selling more than 170 Special Club cuvees from 28 grower members. A focused place to buy small-grower.
wine_retailers.speciality: Special Club grower champagne from the 28 club members

wine_retailers.name: Les Grands Vins de France
wine_retailers.description: A central Epernay cave focused on more than 50 independent grower champagnes from across the appellation, with a weekly five-cuvee tasting as a buying guide.
wine_retailers.speciality: Independent grower champagne from all sub-regions, weekly tasting selection

wine_retailers.name: Champagne Le Mesnil
wine_retailers.address: 19 rue Charpentier Laurain, 51190 Le Mesnil-sur-Oger, France
wine_retailers.description: The cooperative shop of Champagne Le Mesnil, a grand cru grower union on the Cote des Blancs. Direct sales of Blanc de Blancs from the famed Mesnil-sur-Oger.
wine_retailers.speciality: Grand cru Blanc de Blancs from Le Mesnil-sur-Oger cooperative members
